name: Weaviate
tagline: Weaviate is an open-source vector database that stores both objects and vectors, allowing for combining vector search with structured filtering.
description:
Weaviate is an open-source vector database that stores both objects and vectors, allowing for combining vector search with structured filtering.

Docs: https://weaviate.io/developers/weaviate?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  weaviate:
    image: cr.weaviate.io/semitechnologies/weaviate:1.26.4
    volumes:
      - weaviate-data:/var/lib/weaviate
    command:
      - --host
      - 0.0.0.0
      - --port
      - '8080'
      - --scheme
      - http
    environment:
      - DISABLE_TELEMETRY=${DISABLE_TELEMETRY:-true}
      - QUERY_DEFAULTS_LIMIT=${QUERY_DEFAULTS_LIMIT:-1000}
      - LOG_LEVEL=${LOG_LEVEL:-info}
      - GOMEMLIMIT=${GOMEMLIMIT:-1024MiB}
      - GOMAXPROCS=${GOMAXPROCS:-2}
      - AUTHENTICATION_ANONYMOUS_ACCESS_ENABLED=${AUTHENTICATION_ANONYMOUS_ACCESS_ENABLED:-false}
      - AUTHORIZATION_ADMINLIST_USERS=${AUTHORIZATION_ADMINLIST_USERS:-admin@example.com}
      - AUTHENTICATION_APIKEY_USERS=${AUTHENTICATION_APIKEY_USERS:-admin@example.com}
      - AUTHENTICATION_APIKEY_ENABLED=${AUTHENTICATION_APIKEY_ENABLED:-true}
      - AUTHENTICATION_APIKEY_ALLOWED_KEYS=1dd32634b19738395d0b1e632d593c39
      - PERSISTENCE_DATA_PATH=/var/lib/weaviate
      - DEFAULT_VECTORIZER_MODULE=${DEFAULT_VECTORIZER_MODULE:-none}
      - ENABLE_MODULES=${ENABLE_MODULES:-text2vec-openai,generative-openai,qna-openai}
      - CLUSTER_HOSTNAME=${CLUSTER_HOSTNAME:-node1}
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - wget
        - -q
        - --spider
        - http://localhost:8080/v1/.well-known/ready
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 30s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42139:8080
volumes:
  weaviate-data: null
